title: Capetain | Custom minecraft capes mod
description: Capetain is a free mod that lets you set your own cape—visible to all players with the mod!
body:
--- ## 🌐 Quick Setup 🔧 **All cape settings are configured online!** Just visit our website and choose your cape: * [**zpatkyvpatky.xyz**](https://zpatkyvpatky.xyz/) --- ## 🧩 Overview **Capetain** is a free **client-side mod** for Minecraft that allows any player to easily choose a custom cape from the online selection. The cape is visible to everyone who also has the mod installed. --- ## 🚀 Key Features * 🌍 **Online Management**: Select and manage your cape through our simple web interface. * [https://capetain.zpatkyvpatky.xyz](https://zpatkyvpatky.xyz) * 💻 **Client-Side Only**: Works without any server-side modifications or plugins. * 👁️ **Shared Visualization**: Your cape is visible to all players with the mod installed. * 🧵 **Support**: Requires Fabric API, compatible with Minecraft versions **1.19.3 to 1.21.5**. * 🆓 **Free**: The mod and its management are completely free. --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download and install **Fabric Loader** and **Fabric API** for your version of Minecraft. 2. Download the appropriate `.jar` file from Modrinth. 3. Place the `Capetain-.jar` file into the `mods` folder in your Minecraft directory. 4. Launch Minecraft using the Fabric profile. ---
🧥 Choose your cape, show your style – right in the game.
---
